title: Schefflera subdivaricata
taxonomy: Schefflera subdivaricata is classified under the family Araliaceae and the genus Schefflera. This plant is native to the tropical regions of Asia and is part of a group of evergreen shrubs and trees known for their glossy leaves. The specific classification is further divided into the order Apiales and the class Magnoliopsida. Schefflera subdivaricata is a species that belongs to the kingdom Plantae. Its classification also indicates that it is a member of the dicotyledonous flowering plants.
